REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of 537 Garfield Street, Sf Ca)
Off Calendar May-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for and with (administrator) Barbara DeVries.

The sale was confirmed at $700,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $662,000.00 is required.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
